calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Apr-12-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Regina McClendon for Diane Doorlag (Petitioner).

Ms. McClendon stated that her Client filed this petition to have her Husband's interest in a TIC pass to her, that the codicil disinherited the Son, that the other Child is alive and in San Francisco, and that the Son has since passed away. The Court granted the Petition for Spousal Property (subject to review of the order).

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

payments.description: PETN COMMENCING OTHER PROBATE PROCEEDINGS AND OPP
